title: Oopsi!
description: A modpack including the most, useful, beautiful, optimized, friendly Mods. made for everyday use. based on SOP
body:
[![image discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7ba56bdea313f30d12390daaabdd4d5e3893385.webp)](https://discord.gg/CHrHWGjWvh)
---

Hey there!
This modpack might be bit different from what you might normally think of as a modpack. It’s made to be used clientside, (you can use it on any server without the server needing the mods installed).


Remember when you looked at minecraft and said "*Man, i wish i could have both features and preformance.*"

Yeah, me neither ;P

Anyways, here it is! a modpack that is both optimized and feature rich.
It's packed with QOL goodies, that all work on the clientside.



based on [SO](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop). we add our own QOL and performance mods.
I brand this as your everyday modpack.
Why?


- = I make sure the mods don’t change the vanilla experience much.
- = I make sure all mods are useful.
- = I make sure none of the mods are privacy invasive
- = The modpack is heavily optimized (thanks to Simply Optimized for inspiring some of the mod choices!).
- = The mods are customizable feel free to remove or tweak anything to your liking.
- = I’m not money incentivized, no sponsors, no bs like “FeAtUreD SeRvErS”.


I’m not sure what else to write… just YOLO it! <:


---
